spell.wind_spellbooks.tornado.guide: Around a targeted location, create a tornado that will suck in nearby creatures and propulse them in the air
spell.wind_spellbooks.iron_slash.guide: Focus yourself before doing a big dash that slash your enemies
spell.wind_spellbooks.aeropic.guide: Leap forward in a spinning, voltaic attack that will damage your first target and launch you into the air. As long as you hit your target, the attack can be repeated.
spell.wind_spellbooks.almighty_push.guid: Create a area of wind around you knocking back creatures in every directions, causing damage if they impact a wall
spell.wind_spellbooks.wind_blade.guide: Slash forward to send out a concentrated blade of wind, slicing through creatures
spell.wind_spellbooks.tailwind.guide: Imbue yourself with the strength of the wind, increasing your speed and your mobility in the air.
death.attack.wind_spellbooks.tornado.ite: %1$s was crushed by %2$s's tornado while using %3$s
%1$s life was severed by %2$s while using %3$s
death.attack.wind_spellbooks.aeropic.ite: %1$s was beaten up by %2$s while using %3$s
